hooks.name: Test changed components after push
hooks.description: After a git push, identify which files were modified and run the appropriate tests ‚Äî frontend (Playwright) and/or backend (pytest import checks + endpoint verification).

action.prompt:
A git push just happened. Check which files changed in the last commit with `git diff --name-only HEAD~1`. Then run the appropriate tests:

FRONTEND: If any frontend page components (frontend/src/app/*/page.tsx) or test files (frontend/e2e/*.spec.ts) were modified, run the corresponding Playwright tests. Map: /brain‚Üíbrain.spec.ts, /create‚Üícreate.spec.ts, /talent‚Üítalent.spec.ts, /assets‚Üíassets.spec.ts, /models‚Üímodels.spec.ts, /admin‚Üíadmin.spec.ts, /training‚Üítraining.spec.ts, /settings‚Üísettings.spec.ts, /production‚Üíproduction.spec.ts, /publish‚Üípublish.spec.ts, /analytics‚Üíanalytics.spec.ts, /editor‚Üíeditor.spec.ts, /workflows‚Üíworkflows.spec.ts, /admin/fleet‚Üífleet.spec.ts. Run: `cd frontend && npx playwright test e2e/{matched}.spec.ts --project=desktop --workers=1`.

BACKEND: If any backend Python files (backend/**/*.py) were modified, verify the backend still works by running: `curl -s http://localhost:8000/ && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health`. If specific modules changed, also verify their imports work: `cd /Users/garymcdaniel/kiro/ai-studio88 && /Users/garymcdaniel/.local/bin/uv run python -c "from backend.main import app; print(f'Routes: {len(app.routes)}')"`. If infrastructure files changed (backend/infrastructure/*), also check: `curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/infrastructure/worker/progress`.

If NO testable files changed (only docs, scripts, configs), skip testing.

Update .kiro/steering/uat-system.md only if tests were run.
